signal.description: Complete Vitest migration: 564 of 565 test files still use node:test despite vitest 4.1.2 being installed and vitest.config.js existing. Migration specs (VITEST_PILOT_SPEC.md, VITEST_EXPANSION_S1-S3_SPEC.md) exist but execution stalled. Migrate all test files from node:test to vitest for faster execution, better DX, and TDD-first development.

evidence.value: vitest devDep: vitest@4.1.2. vitest.config.js exists with node:test shim. 1/565 files use vitest. 564/565 use node:test. Existing migration specs: VITEST_PILOT, EXPANSION_S1-S3, MIGRATION_ASSESSMENT, STEADY_STATE.
